about.title: About Us
about.description: Located in the heart of Manhattan, Iron Forge Gym has been transforming lives since 2018. Our 15,000 sq ft facility features state-of-the-art equipment, expert trainers, and a community that pushes you to be your best. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete, Iron Forge is where champions are made.

items.name: HIIT Blitz
items.description: High-intensity interval training to torch calories and build endurance.

items.name: Power Lifting
items.description: Structured strength training focused on the big three lifts.

items.name: Yoga Flow
items.description: Restore your body and mind with guided vinyasa flow sessions.

items.name: Boxing Fundamentals
items.description: Learn technique, build power, and relieve stress in the ring.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Iron Forge completely changed my fitness journey. The trainers actually care about your progress.

items.name: James K.
items.text: Best gym in Manhattan, hands down. The community here is unmatched.

items.name: Diana R.
items.text: I've tried every gym in the city. Iron Forge is the only one I've stuck with for over 3 years.
